# SWYMBLE

> SWYMBLE is the software studio and engineering portfolio of a
> fintech-grade software engineer, showcasing production systems, client
> work, and personal experiments built in the open.

Swymble is both a personal engineering brand and a small studio. The
engineer behind it builds fintech and banking systems professionally,
then applies the same discipline to independent products, AI-assisted
tools, and client projects.

## Key pages

- / : Home. Focus areas, featured projects, and the Swymble Universe map.
- /projects : Case studies and shipped project write-ups.
- /labs : Experimental builds and works in progress.
- /blog : Writing on engineering, fintech systems, and building in public.
- /about : Background, professional experience, and technical stack.
- /contact : Get in touch about client work or collaboration.

## Services

Company profile sites, product builds, and AI-powered systems, delivered
with enterprise-grade discipline drawn from fintech production work.

## Contact

Email: hello@swymble.com
Site: https://swymble.com
